title: The Roundup: No Way Out
posterAlt: The Roundup: No Way Out (2023) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Detective Ma Seok-do changes his affiliation from the Geumcheon Police Station to the Metropolitan Investigation Team, in order to eradicate Japanese gangsters who enter Korea to commit heinous crimes.
synopsis: The Roundup: No Way Out is a 2023 action, crime and comedy film from South Korea. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a MA 15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
